creator: scf@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gerald Pfeifer from comment #6)

I would appreciate keeping the OSS option alive.  It is easier to configure than ALSA for some setups involving multiple sound devices.  With OSS, winecfg shows all the devices separately for input and output to easily choose.

I will try to get gstreamer working independently from this issue.  I think the issue was in 8.11 or 8.14 too, so this PR should not be held back due to it.
